WITH purchase_sessions AS (
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', t1."visitStartTime") AS month,
  t1."totals"::OBJECT:"transactions",
  h1.value:"productRevenue"
FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170401 AS t1,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."hits") h1
WHERE t1."totals"::OBJECT:"transactions" >= 1 AND h1.value:"productRevenue" IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', t1."visitStartTime") AS month,
  t1."totals"::OBJECT:"transactions",
  h1.value:"productRevenue"
FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170402 AS t1,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."hits") h1
WHERE t1."totals"::OBJECT:"transactions" >= 1 AND h1.value:"productRevenue" IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', t1."visitStartTime") AS month,
  t1."totals"::OBJECT:"transactions",
  h1.value:"productRevenue"
FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170407 AS t1,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."hits") h1
WHERE t1."totals"::OBJECT:"transactions" >= 1 AND h1.value:"productRevenue" IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', t1."visitStartTime") AS month,
  t1."totals"::OBJECT:"transactions",
  h1.value:"productRevenue"
FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170408 AS t1,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."hits") h1
WHERE t1."totals"::OBJECT:"transactions" >= 1 AND h1.value:"productRevenue" IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', t1."visitStartTime") AS month,
  t1."totals"::OBJECT:"transactions",
  h1.value:"productRevenue"
FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170415 AS t1,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."hits") h1
WHERE t1."totals"::OBJECT:"transactions" >= 1 AND h1.value:"productRevenue" IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', t1."visitStartTime") AS month,
  t1."totals"::OBJECT:"transactions",
  h1.value:"productRevenue"
FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170421 AS t1,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."hits") h1
WHERE t1."totals"::OBJECT:"transactions" >= 1 AND h1.value:"productRevenue" IS NOT NULL
),
non_purchase_sessions AS (
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', t1."visitStartTime") AS month,
  t1."totals"::OBJECT:"transactions",
  h1.value:"productRevenue"
FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170401 AS t1,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."hits") h1
WHERE t1."totals"::OBJECT:"transactions" IS NULL AND h1.value:"productRevenue" IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', t1."visitStartTime") AS month,
  t1."totals"::OBJECT:"transactions",
  h1.value:"productRevenue"
FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170402 AS t1,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."hits") h1
WHERE t1."totals"::OBJECT:"transactions" IS NULL AND h1.value:"productRevenue" IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', t1."visitStartTime") AS month,
  t1."totals"::OBJECT:"transactions",
  h1.value:"productRevenue"
FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170407 AS t1,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."hits") h1
WHERE t1."totals"::OBJECT:"transactions" IS NULL AND h1.value:"productRevenue" IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', t1."visitStartTime") AS month,
  t1."totals"::OBJECT:"transactions",
  h1.value:"productRevenue"
FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170408 AS t1,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."hits") h1
WHERE t1."totals"::OBJECT:"transactions" IS NULL AND h1.value:"productRevenue" IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', t1."visitStartTime") AS month,
  t1."totals"::OBJECT:"transactions",
  h1.value:"productRevenue"
FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170415 AS t1,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."hits") h1
WHERE t1."totals"::OBJECT:"transactions" IS NULL AND h1.value:"productRevenue" IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', t1."visitStartTime") AS month,
  t1."totals"::OBJECT:"transactions",
  h1.value:"productRevenue"
FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170421 AS t1,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."hits") h1
WHERE t1."totals"::OBJECT:"transactions" IS NULL AND h1.value:"productRevenue" IS NULL
),
final_output AS (
SELECT
  month,
  CASE 
    WHEN transactions >= 1 THEN 'purchase'
    ELSE 'non_purchase'
  END AS cohort,
  COUNT(h1.value:"page.pagePath") AS pageviews
FROM purchase_sessions
JOIN LATERAL FLATTEN(input => purchase_sessions."hits") h1 ON TRUE
GROUP BY month, cohort
UNION ALL
SELECT
  month,
  CASE 
    WHEN transactions IS NULL THEN 'non_purchase'
    ELSE 'purchase'
  END AS cohort,
  COUNT(h1.value:"page.pagePath") AS pageviews
FROM non_purchase_sessions
JOIN LATERAL FLATTEN(input => non_purchase_sessions."hits") h1 ON TRUE
GROUP BY month, cohort
)
SELECT
  month,
  cohort,
  AVG(pageviews) AS avg_pageviews
FROM final_output
GROUP BY month, cohort;
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -30.0; best score among failed candidates

final_sql:
WITH youtube_products AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT t1."fullVisitorId"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170731 AS t1,
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."hits") h
  WHERE h.value:"productName" ILIKE '%YouTube%'
),
total_quantity_excluding_youtube AS (
  SELECT
    h.value:"productName" AS "productName",
    SUM(h.value:"productRevenue") AS "total_quantity"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170731 AS t1,
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."hits") h
  WHERE h.value:"productName" NOT ILIKE '%YouTube%'
    AND t1."fullVisitorId" IN (SELECT "fullVisitorId" FROM youtube_products)
  GROUP BY h.value:"productName"
)
SELECT "productName", "total_quantity"
FROM total_quantity_excluding_youtube
ORDER BY "total_quantity" DESC
LIMIT 1;
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -40.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: small result confirmed

final_sql:
WITH monthly_conversion_rates AS (
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', t1."date"::DATE) AS month,
  SUM(t.value:"hits"::NUMBER) AS total_hits,
  SUM(t.value:"pageviews"::NUMBER) AS total_pageviews
FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170430 AS t1,
LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."totals") t
WHERE t1."date" >= '20170101' AND t1."date" <= '20170331'
GROUP BY month
)
SELECT
  month,
  SUM(total_hits) AS total_hits,
  SUM(total_pageviews) AS total_pageviews,
  CASE WHEN SUM(total_pageviews) > 0 THEN (SUM(total_hits) / SUM(total_pageviews)) * 100 ELSE 0 END AS conversion_rate
FROM monthly_conversion_rates
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month ASC;
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -50.0; best score among failed candidates

final_sql:
WITH inventor_counts AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('FIVE_YEAR', TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(t1."publication_date"), 'YYYYMMDD')) AS period,
    COUNT(t1."publication_number") AS total_patent_publications,
    COUNT(i.value:"field") AS inventor_count
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS t1
  , LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."inventor") i
  WHERE t1."country_code" = 'CA' AND i.value:"field" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY period
)
SELECT
  period,
  AVG(inventor_count) AS avg_number_of_inventors,
  SUM(total_patent_publications) AS total_patent_publications
FROM inventor_counts
GROUP BY period
ORDER BY period ASC;
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -30.0; best score among failed candidates

final_sql:
WITH assignee_application_counts AS (
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(t1."filing_date"))) AS "year",
  a.value:"field"::STRING AS "assignee",
  COUNT(t1."application_number") AS "application_count"
FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS t1,
LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."assignee") a
WHERE t1."application_kind" ILIKE '%A61%'
GROUP BY "year", "assignee"
),
max_application_counts AS (
SELECT
  "year",
  "assignee",
  "application_count",
  RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY "year" ORDER BY "application_count" DESC) AS rank
FROM assignee_application_counts
)
SELECT
  "year",
  "assignee",
  "application_count"
FROM max_application_counts
WHERE rank = 1;
selection_reason: Candidate 3 (strategy=cte_first) scored -30.0; best score among failed candidates
